title: Nations Event
body:
# Nations Event Modpack This is simply a collection of mods to use for the participants of the Nations Event featured in [jjkay03](https://www.youtube.com/jjkay03) YouTube videos. Discord where the event takes place: https://discord.jjkay03.com/
![Screenshot NE3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd328708a4f06637625c37b42557d00e7c997f4c.png)
